sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 61 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.750/2026 2. For orders on CMA No.751/2026 3. For hearing of main case 20.04.2026 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, advocate for respondent Per joint request the impugned order and underlying order are set aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned adjudicating officer to proceed with the case afresh in accordance with law. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
